MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Oai Duong Au, (415-623-4222) Defendant and moving party in Pro Per.
No other appearances in the matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT OAI AU's Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena is Granted. "The deposition subpoena for the production of business records is hereby quashed in its entirety." Order is signed in open court.
